description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with an L-shaped footprint, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The structure features a combination of long and short wings, with the longer section capped by a simple gable roof and the shorter section by a steeper, cross-gabled roof. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark, shingled roofing. There is a small, covered porch area at the intersection of the two wings, and several windows are distributed along the facades, providing natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway or paved area adjacent to the porch, suggesting vehicular access. The overall design is practical and suburban, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A light-colored, L-shaped bungalow with a gable and cross-gabled roof, set on a grassy plot with a small porch and multiple windows.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance, porch, and the long wing with its gable roof.
description_view_1: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, highlighting the shorter wing and the intersection of the two rooflines.
description_view_2: A side view emphasizing the full length of the long wing and the simple gable roof, with minimal detail on the porch.
description_view_3: The back and angled side of the bungalow are visible, showing the cross-gabled roof and the rear facade.
